all.en: This document outlines the company maternity leave policy effective immediately.
all.zh: 本文件說明公司即日起生效之育嬰假辦法。

all.en: The policy applies to all full-time employees regardless of tenure length.
all.zh: 本辦法適用於所有全職員工，不論其在職年資長短。

all.en: Eligible employees may take up to twenty weeks of paid maternity leave.
all.zh: 符合資格的員工最多可享有二十週的有薪育嬰假。

all.en: The first sixteen weeks are paid at full base salary by the company.
all.zh: 前十六週由公司支付百分之百底薪。

all.en: The remaining four weeks are paid at eighty percent of base salary.
all.zh: 後四週則以底薪百分之八十支付。

all.en: Leave may begin up to four weeks prior to the expected delivery date.
all.zh: 假期最早可於預產期前四週開始請領。

all.en: Employees are encouraged to plan with their managers at least three months ahead.
all.zh: 鼓勵員工至少提前三個月與主管討論規劃。

all.en: A doctor certificate confirming pregnancy must accompany the formal request.
all.zh: 正式申請書須附醫師開立的懷孕證明。

all.en: Spouses or partners are eligible for ten weeks of paid parental leave.
all.zh: 配偶或伴侶可享有十週的有薪親職假。

all.en: Adoptive parents qualify for an equivalent amount of paid leave time.
all.zh: 領養父母亦可享有等同期間的有薪假。

all.en: Leave taken for a stillbirth or miscarriage receives the same protection.
all.zh: 因死產或流產所請之假享有同等保障。

all.en: Employee benefits such as health insurance remain in force during the leave.
all.zh: 健康保險等員工福利於休假期間持續有效。

all.en: Pension and retirement contributions continue to accrue without interruption.
all.zh: 退休金與退休帳戶提撥於期間持續累積不中斷。

all.en: Annual leave entitlement also accrues during the maternity leave period.
all.zh: 特休假權益亦於育嬰假期間繼續累積。

all.en: Returning mothers are guaranteed the same role or a comparable equivalent.
all.zh: 返職的母親保證可回任原職或同等職位。

all.en: A phased return-to-work arrangement is available for up to twelve weeks.
all.zh: 返職階段可申請最長十二週的漸進式上工安排。

all.en: Mothers may begin with reduced hours and gradually transition to full schedule.
all.zh: 母親可先以縮減工時開始並逐步回到全工時。

all.en: Dedicated, private nursing rooms are provided at every major company location.
all.zh: 公司於各主要據點均設有專屬的私人哺乳室。

all.en: Refrigerators for milk storage are available adjacent to each nursing room.
all.zh: 每間哺乳室旁均備有母乳儲存冰箱。

all.en: Flexible scheduling for medical appointments will be accommodated as needed.
all.zh: 醫療預約所需的彈性排程將視情況予以配合。

all.en: Employees can request additional unpaid leave for caregiving responsibilities.
all.zh: 員工可因照護需求申請額外的無薪假。

all.en: All maternity-related discussions remain strictly confidential within HR.
all.zh: 所有與育嬰相關之溝通均嚴格保密於人資範圍內。

all.en: Questions regarding eligibility or benefits should be directed to the HR office.
all.zh: 如有資格或福利相關疑問，請洽人資辦公室。
